title: collospermum hastatum
intro: Collospermum hastatum, also known as New Zealand turmeric, is a plant species native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, due to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Collospermum hastatum include reducing joint pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Collospermum hastatum are often made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, and are used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
